markdown:
#  Download Submittals Attachments (Android) 
##  Background 
Downloading a submittal's attachments allows you to access these items when in offline mode.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:** 'Read Only' level permissions or higher on the project's Submittals tool.


##  Steps 
Navigate to the **Submittals** tool on an Android mobile device.
#### Download the Attachments of an Individual Submittal
  1. Tap **Download** ![Icon Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb790ca025ab8263bb70876fff439d20/e2e670201b885a1cdfd50585e9601316/icon-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon will momentarily display in place of the download icon. You can now access the submittal attachments in offline mode.


#### Download the Attachments of all Submittals
  1. Tap **Download** ![Icon Checkmark](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fb790ca025ab8263bb70876fff439d20/e2e670201b885a1cdfd50585e9601316/icon-checkmark.png?fm=webp&h=19) icon. You can now access the submittal attachments in offline mode.


## See Also
  * [View a Submittal (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/view-a-submittal-android)
  * [Submittals (Android) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/permissions)
  * [View Submittal PDF Attachments (Android)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-android/tutorials/view-submittal-pdf-attachments-android)
title: Download Submittals Attachments (Android)
description: How to download a submittal's attachments on an Android mobile device so that the items can be viewed in offline mode.
